cut_off.college_name: Regency Hospital Cancer and Gastro Care Centre (Tower -2) Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Regency Hospital Cancer and Gastro Care Centre (Tower -2) NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff was 442, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Regency Hospital Cancer and Gastro Care Centre (Tower -2) DNB cutoff 2025 was 442 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 442, DNB in Medical Oncology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Candidates can use the provided filters to learn more about the NEET SS cutoff across different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories.

Candidates appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table given below to view or download the consolidated round-wise cutoff PDFs. The cutoff PDFs are available round-wise for 2025, 2024 and 2023.
